operatorPrincipleTitle: Partners stay focused on legal judgment.
operatorPrincipleBody: The Operator handles intake, response timing, appointment coordination, task creation, document follow-up, and escalation filtering before a partner is interrupted.
operatorPrincipleMetricDetail: of intake and follow-up actions handled before partner review.
todaySummaryBody: New matters triaged, consults booked, documents requested, tasks created, and only high-risk issues escalated.

activityFeed.summary: Sent consult availability to litigation prospect
Created document request task for trust review
Updated matter status and source attribution

messages.speaker: Prospect
messages.message: Can someone review a lease before Friday?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Yes. I can collect the lease, deadline, and key concerns now so the attorney has context.

messages.speaker: Prospect
messages.message: Is this urgent enough for a lawyer today?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: I can triage the issue now. If it involves a deadline or legal risk, I will escalate it immediately.

messages.speaker: Operator Action
messages.message: Escalated because legal deadline was detected.

messages.speaker: Caller
messages.message: Missed call from Marcus Bell at 9:17 AM

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Sent callback text and requested practice area, deadline, and opposing party.

tasks.title: Run conflict check for Nora Kim
Request lease PDF from Daniel Price

escalations.title: Potential conflict-sensitive matter
escalations.why: Prospect named an opposing party that may overlap with current clients.
escalations.next: Run conflict check before sharing legal guidance.
escalations.draft: Before we discuss the facts, I need to complete a conflict check. Please send the opposing party name and related entities.

escalations.title: Deadline-driven litigation inquiry
escalations.why: Prospect indicated a response deadline within 48 hours.
escalations.next: Partner should determine whether same-day review is appropriate.
escalations.draft: This may be time-sensitive. I am routing it for attorney review so we can advise on the right next step.

escalations.title: Scope request outside standard intake
escalations.next: Partner should approve scope and fee posture.
escalations.draft: I can have the attorney review the requested scope and confirm what we can include.

demoScenario.title: Live Demo Scenario
steps: Partner is notified only when legal judgment is needed

events.summary: Escalation created because conflict risk was detected
